$meta.purpose: Machine-readable design rules for AI-driven design generation

howToUse: Follow the files in the specified readingOrder. First, internalize the core design DNA and philosophy. Apply semantic colors and typography correctly based on hierarchy, density, and theme mappings. Ensure spacing and layouts adhere to the grid structure, and construct UI components exactly mimicking the class recipes in components.json.

philosophy.summary: Core design DNA, principles, do's, and dont's of the utilitarian dashboard system.

color.summary: Light and dark theme palettes, semantic mapping rules, and accessibility-compliant color pairings.

typography.summary: Font families, size scale (with high-density rules), and font weight guidelines.

spacing.summary: Formal and informal spacing steps, layouts, card gap guidelines, and rhythm rules.

radius-elevation.summary: Border-radius scale formulas and shadow/elevation layers.

motion.summary: Verification of custom transition presets, durations, easing, and micro-animation restrictions.

layout.summary: Responsive design breakpoints, container max-widths, sticky headers/sidebars, and grid structures.

components.summary: Utility-class and primitive variant recipes for buttons, sidebar, header, support grid, topic cards, and drawers.
